title: Ivelina Dineva's Post - LinkedIn
full_text:
Top 10 Pre-seed to Series A funding rounds of the week:
Top 10 Pre-seed to Series A funding rounds of the week:
⚫ AI ⚫
🔶 1. Edra, a startup that helps companies automate workflows by mining existing data rather than asking employees to document processes from scratch, emerged from stealth with $30 million in Series A funding.
→ Investors: Sequoia, 8VC, A*
→ Founded by: Eugen Alpeza and Yannis Karamanlakis
🔶 2. Sequen, a startup providing real-time personalization and ranking infrastructure for consumer apps, raised a $16 million Series A round.
→ Investors: White Star Capital, Threshold Ventures, Greycroft
→ Founded by: Zoë Weil
🔶 3. Nyne.ai, a startup that provides data helping AI agents connect and interpret people's public digital footprints across the internet, raised a $5.3 million seed round.
→ Investors: Wischoff Ventures, South Park Commons
→ Founded by: Michael Fanous and Emad Fanous
🔶 4. Certiv, a startup building a platform to govern and secure autonomous AI agents used inside enterprise systems, raised a $4.2 million pre-seed round.
→ Investors: Aviso Ventures, Founders' Co-op, Fortson
→ Founded by: Jason Needham
🔶 5. Laminar, a startup building an observability platform to capture and analyze AI agent activity across long-running workflows, raised a $3 million seed round.
→ Investors: Atlantic.vc, Y Combinator
→ Founded by: @Robert Kim lam
🔶 6. WhiteBridge.ai AI, a startup whose AI search engine compiles reports on people using data from public and online sources, raised a $3 million seed round.
→ Investors: FirstPick VC, First Degree, and others
→ Founded by: Tomas Martunas, Irmantas Motiejūnas, Justinas Barauskas, and Paulius Taraškevičius
⚫ Security ⚫
🔶 7. Knox Systems, Inc., a startup operating a managed cloud platform that helps software companies meet U.S. government security standards and run compliant applications, raised a $25 million Series A round.
→ Investors: B Capital, M12, and others
→ Founded by: Irina Denisenko
🔶 8. Tracebit, a startup that plants decoy data and systems to detect intruders in cloud environments, raised a $20 million Series A round.
→ Investors: FirstMark, Accel, and others
→ Founded by: Andy Smith and Sam Cox
⚫ Fintech ⚫
🔶 9. Ezra, a startup whose platform organizes deal data and automates credit analysis and due diligence for asset-backed financing, raised an $8 million seed round.
→ Investors: Congruent Ventures, Planeteer, and others
→ Founded by: Dan Rosen and Dori Rutkevitz
⚫ Restaurant Tech ⚫
🔶 10. Choice, a startup that lets restaurants manage orders, reservations, menus, and payments in one system, raised a $7.1 million Series A round.
→ Investors: Alea Capital, Reflex Capital, and others
→ Founded by: Alex Ilyash
Join the weekly EverythingStartups newsletter for more on where early-stage capital is flowing + tech signals across USA, Europe, and Israel:
https://linktr.ee/ivelinad
#startups #fundraising #funding #founders #venturecapital #VC
